name: Max SBI Card SELECT
milestoneBenefits: 2,400 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 25,000 across Landmark Stores
8,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 75,000 across Landmark Stores
12,000 bonus Reward Points on annual spends of Rs 1.5 lakh across Landmark Stores
12,000 bonus Reward Points on overall annual retail spends of Rs 3 lakh
joiningBenefits: 6,000 bonus Reward Points worth Rs 1,500 on payment of annual fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of annual fee payment
renewalBenefits: 6,000 Reward Points worth Rs 1,500 on payment of renewal fee
Reward Points are credited within 30 days of renewal fee payment
additionalBenefits: Reward Points can be redeemed instantly at Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, and Max stores
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 500 to Rs 3,000, capped at Rs 100 per statement cycle

redemption.ecosystemLabel: Lifestyle, Home Centre, Spar, and Max stores

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-01
Audited against official SBI Card product page, MAX SELECT card T&C booklet, customer notice dated 1 Aug 2025, and MITC page on 2026-06-01.
W.e.f. 1 Sep 2025, reward accrual on digital gaming platforms/merchants and government related transactions is discontinued for Max SBI Card SELECT.
